# Liebe meines Lebens

---

**An original song written, composed, created, and owned by [Abu Sayed](https://abusayed.com.bd/)**

---

## 🎵 Song Information

| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| **Title** | Liebe meines Lebens |
| **Written By** | [Abu Sayed](https://abusayed.com.bd/) |
| **Written On** | June 24, 2026 |
| **Song Page** | [Open Song Page](https://imabusayed.github.io/liebe-meines-lebens/) |
| **License** | [View License](./LICENSE.md) |
| **Get License** | [License this song: Liebe meines Lebens](https://music.abusayed.com.bd/Licensing/?https://imabusayed.github.io/liebe-meines-lebens/) |
| **Author** | Abu Sayed |
| **Rights** | All Rights Reserved |

## 📂 Repository Contents

- `lyrics.txt` - Full song lyrics

---

## 📝 Lyric Preview

> Baby, steig ein, die Stadt schläft, aber wir sind wach
> Der Bass schlägt, dein Herzschlag, wir machen die Nacht zum Tag
> Rote Lippen, schwarzer Benz, wir flieh'n vor dem System
> Liebe meines Lebens, Baby, wir beide sind extrem
> ...

[**View Full Lyrics**](./lyrics.txt) | [**View Metadata**](./manifest.json) | [**View Proofs**](./hashes.txt)

---

## 👤 About Abu Sayed

Abu Sayed is a multi-disciplinary creator, musician, and developer.
He is the founder of [Vibe Tool](https://vibetool.org/) and a prolific songwriter
whose music spans Bangla, Hindi, Arabic, Punjabi, and English.

- **Website:** [abusayed.com.bd](https://abusayed.com.bd/)
- **Contact:** [hi@abusayed.com.bd](mailto:hi@abusayed.com.bd)
